text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Bravo. That rescue went rather well,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My magnificent beauty shined clearly<n>through the
glass, giving you the<n>extra boost you required!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! No need to thank me! My<n>loveliness exists to
save the whole<n>world, after all!
